caption: A man wearing a white collared shirt, a red bow tie, and suspenders is seated in a recording studio. He has a large, pointed, grey wig on his head and is wearing black over-ear headphones. He is positioned in front of a professional black microphone, and his expression shifts slightly as he speaks and smiles throughout the sequence. In the background, there are framed photographs on a wall and various clothing items, including a yellow shirt with the text "LEE" visible. On-screen logos appear in the lower corners; one features a microphone graphic with the text "PODCAST" and "STALID", while another on the right side reads "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". The scene remains static in its composition, focusing on the man's upper body as he engages in a conversation.
